
Recruitment {data-navmenu="Population"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Recruitment and Residuals

```{r rec_resid_stack}
rec           <- mv$recruitment
rec_stks      <- if ("stock" %in% names(rec) && length(unique(rec$stock)) > 1L) unique(rec$stock) else NULL
stock_pal_rec <- c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd")
sigma         <- if (!is.null(mv$sr_params$sigmaR)) mv$sr_params$sigmaR else 1L
has_devs_stock <- !is.null(mv$rec_devs) && "stock" %in% names(mv$rec_devs) &&
                  length(unique(mv$rec_devs$stock)) > 1L

rec_sh <- list()
if (!is.null(mv$sr_params$R0))
  rec_sh <- list(list(type="line", x0=min(years), x1=max(years),
    y0=mv$sr_params$R0, y1=mv$sr_params$R0,
    line=list(color="#999999", width=1.5, dash="dash")))

.rec_panel <- function(stk, si, label) {
  sub <- if (!is.null(stk)) rec[rec$stock == stk, , drop=FALSE] else rec
  sub <- sub[order(sub$year), , drop=FALSE]
  col <- if (!is.null(stk)) stock_pal_rec[((si-1L)%%length(stock_pal_rec))+1L] else "#2ca02c"
  lbl <- if (!is.null(stk)) stk else "Recruitment"
  p   <- plot_ly()
  if ("lwr" %in% names(sub) && any(!is.na(sub$lwr)))
    p <- add_ribbons(p=p, x=sub$year, ymin=sub$lwr, ymax=sub$upr,
      line=list(width=0), fillcolor="rgba(127,127,127,0.15)",
      showlegend=FALSE, hoverinfo="skip")
  p <- add_lines(p=p, x=sub$year, y=sub$est,
    line=list(color=col, width=2), name=lbl,
    showlegend=!is.null(rec_stks) && is.null(stk),
    hovertemplate=paste0(lbl, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  if (label && !is.null(stk)) lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label=stk))
  lay$yaxis$title <- "Recruitment"
  lay$shapes      <- rec_sh
  do.call(layout, c(list(p=p), lay))
}

.resid_panel <- function(stk) {
  rd <- if (!is.null(stk) && has_devs_stock)
          mv$rec_devs[mv$rec_devs$stock == stk, , drop=FALSE]
        else if (!is.null(mv$rec_devs)) mv$rec_devs
        else NULL
  p <- plot_ly()
  if (!is.null(rd) && nrow(rd) > 0) {
    std_r <- rd$est / sigma
    p <- add_bars(p=p, x=rd$year, y=std_r,
      marker=list(color=ifelse(std_r >= 0, "#2ca02c", "#d62728")),
      showlegend=FALSE, hovertemplate="%{x}: %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>")
    mean_r <- mean(std_r, na.rm=TRUE)
    lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
    lay$xaxis$title <- "Year"
    lay$yaxis$title <- "Std. residual"
    lay$shapes <- list(
      list(type="line", x0=min(rd$year), x1=max(rd$year), y0=0, y1=0,
           line=list(color="#666666", dash="dash")),
      list(type="line", x0=min(rd$year), x1=max(rd$year), y0=mean_r, y1=mean_r,
           line=list(color="#d62728", dash="dot")))
    p <- do.call(layout, c(list(p=p), lay))
  }
  p
}

if (!is.null(rec_stks)) {
  # Multi-stock: stocks as columns
  rec_pans <- lapply(seq_along(rec_stks), function(i) .rec_panel(rec_stks[i], i, TRUE))
  if (!is.null(mv$rec_devs)) {
    resid_pans <- lapply(rec_stks, .resid_panel)
    all_pans <- c(rec_pans, resid_pans)
    p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(all_pans, list(
      nrows=2, shareX=TRUE, titleX=FALSE, titleY=TRUE,
      heights=c(0.6, 0.4), margin=0.04
    )))
    p_out <- layout(p=p_out, xaxis=list(title="Year"))
  } else {
    p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(rec_pans, list(
      nrows=1L, shareX=TRUE, titleX=FALSE, titleY=TRUE, margin=0.04
    )))
    p_out <- layout(p=p_out, xaxis=list(title="Year"))
  }
  modelVis::mv_config(p=p_out)
} else {
  # Single-stock: 2-panel stack (rec + residuals)
  p_rec   <- .rec_panel(NULL, 1L, FALSE)
  p_rec   <- layout(p=p_rec, showlegend=FALSE)
  p_resid <- .resid_panel(NULL)
  if (!is.null(mv$rec_devs)) {
    p_out <- subplot(p_rec, p_resid, nrows=2, shareX=TRUE,
      titleY=TRUE, heights=c(0.6, 0.4), margin=0.04)
  } else {
    p_out <- p_rec
  }
  modelVis::mv_config(p=p_out)
}
```

### Stock-Recruitment

```{r sr_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$stock_recruit)}
sr <- mv$stock_recruit
p <- plot_ly()

# B-H curve overlay if params available
if (has_sr) {
  ssb_range <- seq(
    from = 0,
    to = max(sr$ssb, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1,
    length.out = 200
  )
  bh_r <- mv$sr_params$reca * ssb_range /
    (1 + mv$sr_params$recb * ssb_range)
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p,
    x = ssb_range, y = bh_r,
    line = list(color = "#cccccc", width = 2),
    name = "B-H curve", showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverinfo = "skip"
  )
}

# Observed points coloured by year
p <- add_markers(
  p = p,
  x = sr$ssb, y = sr$recruitment,
  color = ~sr$year,
  colors = c("#1f77b4", "#d62728"),
  marker = list(
    size = 6,
    line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
  ),
  text = ~sr$year,
  hovertemplate = paste0(
    "Year: %{text}<br>SSB: %{x:.3g}<br>",
    "R: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
  ),
  showlegend = FALSE
)

# B0/R0 reference lines
sr_shapes <- list()
if (!is.null(mv$sr_params$B0)) {
  sr_shapes <- c(sr_shapes, list(list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = mv$sr_params$B0, x1 = mv$sr_params$B0,
    y0 = 0, y1 = 1, yref = "paper",
    line = list(
      color = "#99999966", width = 1, dash = "dash"
    )
  )))
}
if (!is.null(mv$sr_params$R0)) {
  sr_shapes <- c(sr_shapes, list(list(
    type = "line",
    x0 = 0, x1 = 1, xref = "paper",
    y0 = mv$sr_params$R0, y1 = mv$sr_params$R0,
    line = list(
      color = "#99999966", width = 1, dash = "dash"
    )
  )))
}

lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Spawning biomass"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Recruitment"
lay$title <- "Stock-Recruitment"
lay$shapes <- sr_shapes
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```
